highlights.text: I wrote on Thursday 4pm: If I had to throw [my lean] out there, its that after 5 big red days, ES can try to recover the 5918-22 zone and put in a rally to 5951, 5973, 5988+”.
I wrote Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is that ES can try to follow up this rally more given this was the 1st green day in 6.
Short Squeezes are always triggered by my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.

post_title: Is The Relief Bounce In SPX Over? Jan 7th Plan
